subject: [PATCH v5 9/9] mm: switch deferred split shrinker to list_lru

reviews.author: Lance Yang
reviews.summary: Reviewer Lance Yang noted that the patch has already landed in mm-stable and offered to send a follow-up patch, indicating no specific technical concerns or objections.
reviews.raw_body:
Thanks.

Looks like this has already landed in mm-stable. If you're okay with it,
I can send the follow-up.

From: Lance Yang <lance.yang@linux.dev>
Date: Tue, 9 Jun 2026 10:56:45 +0800
Subject: [PATCH] mm: prepare deferred split metadata only for anon swapin

__swap_cache_alloc() prepares deferred split metadata for large swapcache
folios.

That also covers shmem swapin, because shmem_swap_alloc_folio() can call
swapin_sync() with a large order[1]. But shmem folios are not queued on
the deferred split queue, so preparing the metadata doesn't buy us
anything there.

So let's limit it to anon swapin.

[1] https://lore.kernel.org/all/20260601132135.14272-1-lance.yang@linux.dev/

Signed-off-by: Lance Yang <lance.yang@linux.dev>
---
 mm/swap_state.c | 3 ++-
 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/mm/swap_state.c b/mm/swap_state.c
index 9c3a5cf99778..7adac957c2b8 100644
--- a/mm/swap_state.c
+++ b/mm/swap_state.c
@@ -465,7 +465,8 @@ static struct folio *__swap_cache_alloc(struct swap_cluster_info *ci,
 		return ERR_PTR(-ENOMEM);
 	}
 
-	if (order > 1 && folio_memcg_alloc_deferred(folio)) {
+	if (order > 1 && vma && vma_is_anonymous(vma) &&
+	    folio_memcg_alloc_deferred(folio)) {
 		spin_lock(&ci->lock);
 		__swap_cache_do_del_folio(ci, folio, entry, shadow);
 		spin_unlock(&ci->lock);
-- 
2.39.3 (Apple Git-146)

reviews.author: Lorenzo Stoakes
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that folio_memcg_alloc_deferred() may not work correctly for anonymous pages backed by private file mappings, as these can have multiple memcgs associated with them.
reviews.raw_body:
A folio can be anon for a non-shmem file-backed VMA though?
E.g. MAP_PRIVATE-mapped file-backed mappings?

Not sure if that's something that'd be a factor here/meaningful though.

reviews.author: Lance Yang
reviews.summary: Reviewer Lance Yang pointed out that the current implementation of vma_is_anonymous() is overly restrictive and suggested using !vma_is_shmem(vma) instead to improve the accuracy of the deferred split shrinker's behavior.
reviews.raw_body:
Ah, good point! vma_is_anonymous() is too strong here ...

Maybe use !vma_is_shmem(vma) instead?

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch updates the deferred split shrinker to use list_lru, which properly sets up per-node and per-cgroup lists. This change addresses a suboptimal handling of cgroups in the deferred split queue, where large pages on other nodes were being split unnecessarily. The new approach streamlines list operations and reclaim walks, and is used by other major shrinkers already. The patch also adds calls to create node heads for the cgroup at once when splittable pages are created, eliminating the need for special care in migration code between nodes.
